_comment: Mission-1 batch Phase-3 STAGED reconcile candidates - human approves in the Map client panel. Evidence pulled 2026-07-22/23 (read-only). 'preview' = whole-history BQ totals (AUD). Sheet cross-checks use SUM to 2026-07-08.
preparedBy: Mission-1 batch prep session (Claude) - see PHASE3_BATCH_PREP_REPORT.md
platformAudit: TTD rules use mode ROLLUP because the advertiser exists under TWO spellings ('PopTrack' = all spend to date; 'PropTrack' = corrected spelling emitting 0-spend rows since 2026-07-22) - rollup spans spellings and dedupes by campaign name, so the upstream fix-up cannot double-count. The 2 TTD rules split the 3 TTD campaign names 2+1 with zero overlap (BANKING-ABM vs COBA-EVENT2026). LinkedIn rule verified against the account's FULL 6-group list: claims exactly the 4 Banking-ABM groups.
warnings: BILLED BASIS: TTD COSTS is client-billed - set spendMult=1 on the Banking ABM TTD row (currently 2.0337, the sheet's clientSpend/mediaSpend artifact) before/with approval.
The COBA pair is a DELIBERATE CHANNEL CROSSING (DOOH Grid row -> TTD display campaign) - flagged medium, human decides; there is no DOOH source anywhere.

ADVERTISER RENAME IN FLIGHT: watch the first syncs after TTD delivery resumes - if new spend lands under the 'PropTrack' spelling the rollup rules still catch it, but the readiness view will show two advertisers.
LinkedIn platformMargin is 0 on the row (LinkedIn = Campaign-Margin channel, fine); TTD platformMargin 0.60 matches the standard.

pairs.rationale: 2 campaigns (PROPTRACK_BANKING-ABM_MAY-JUN2026_DISPLAY_AU + _VIDEO_AU) under the misspelled 'PopTrack' advertiser; the corrected 'PropTrack' spelling emits 0-spend duplicates since 07-22 - rollup spans both. To 07-08: $12,928.87 vs sheet clientSpend $12,810.54 (+0.9%). Whole-history $13,112.87. spendMult 2.0337 -> 1 (billed COSTS).

4 groups at GROUP grain (Awareness+Leadgen x 2 vintages - the '2011_' job prefix arrived 2026-07-07 mid-flight). To 07-08: $10,945.21 vs sheet clientSpend $10,707.40 (+2.2%). AUD account, media=billed, spendMult already 1. Excludes the 2025 groups ('Add PO Number_Proptrack Nov 12', '1750_..COBA event campaign').

FLAGGED channel crossing: the TTD campaign PROPTRACK_COBA-EVENT2026_JULY2026_DISPLAY_AU ($3,999.92, 07-15..21) matches the row's event (COBA, 07-19..22) but is a DISPLAY campaign on the Trade Desk table - there is no DOOH source, so approving records this row's delivery under channel 'Trade Desk'. Row is Not Active with no budget; if approved also set spendMult=1 and give the row a budget. Distinct from the 2025 LinkedIn COBA group (1750_, $8,499 - different year, different channel).

spendMultResets.reason: ONLY if the flagged COBA pair is approved (TTD billed feed)

unmatchedBq.note: Nov-2025..Feb-2026 creative program (12 campaigns: FOMO / Grow with Confidence / Talent gap etc.) - no Grid row. Expected: the Central sheet tracks current campaigns only.
The 2025 COBA event (Aug-Sep 2025) - a prior-year edition of the 2026 COBA row; no Grid row.
Billed total of the 2025 DV360 history - no Grid row reads DV360; the spec entry is kept for reconcile visibility only.
